title: Lenskit Retrieval Evaluation Diagnostics Report
description: Diagnostic classification of retrieval evaluation misses. Provides per-miss root-cause analysis without modifying existing metrics or ranking behavior. Categorizes why each expected target was not found in top-k results.

authority.description: Top-level self-declaration of authority class for this diagnostics artifact.

risk_class.description: Top-level self-declaration of risk class for this diagnostics artifact.

total_misses.description: Total number of misses (expected targets not found in top-k).

diagnostic_breakdowns.description: Count of misses by primary diagnosis category.

target_in_top_k.description: Expected target found in top-k (not a miss).

target_exists_not_in_top_k.description: Target exists in index/canonical but was not observed in top-k results. Absolute rank outside top-k is unknown unless overfetch diagnostics are run.

target_missing_from_index.description: Target path/identifier not in current chunk index.

target_missing_from_canonical.description: Target path not found in canonical_md artifact.

stale_expected_target.description: Expected target path indicates stale snapshot (historical identifier).

query_target_ambiguous.description: Query or target definition is ambiguous or malformed.

diagnostic_inconclusive.description: Miss could not be conclusively classified (instrumentation gap).

index_stats.description: Statistics about the index and canonical artifacts.

total_chunks.description: Total number of chunks in the index.

canonical_md_exists.description: Whether canonical_md artifact exists and is readable.

citation_map_exists.description: Whether citation_map_jsonl artifact exists and is readable.

diagnostics.description: Array of diagnostic records, one per query miss.

query_id.description: Unique identifier for the query (from queries.md or gold set).

expected_target.description: The expected target path or identifier from the gold set.

primary_diagnosis.description: Primary root cause of the miss.

target_found_in_index.description: Was the expected target path found in the chunk index?

target_found_in_canonical.description: Was the expected target found in canonical_md?

target_found_in_citation_map.description: Is the target reachable via citation_map_jsonl through chunk_index path->chunk_id bridge?

rank_in_results.description: If observed in returned results, rank position (1-indexed). null when not observed or when no overfetch rank is available.

top_k.description: The k value used for top-k evaluation. null if not applicable.

query_had_zero_hits.description: Did the query return 0 total results from the search?

canonical_path_check.description: Status of path lookup in canonical_md ('exact_match', 'variant_found', 'not_found', 'canonical_unavailable').

possible_path_variants.description: If target not found exactly, list of similar or related paths in index.

secondary_diagnoses.description: Additional contributing factors (informational, not primary cause).

confidence.description: Confidence level in the diagnosis classification.

instrumentation_notes.description: Optional notes if diagnosis is inconclusive or requires manual review.
